name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Friend: Need your name on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943c38/1517556180/VEsH/ "http://vanhollen.org?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")
Friend,
As you may have heard by now, I am running for the U.S. Senate. I know it will be a hard-fought race. Sadly, we also know it could be record-breaking for the amount of money spent.
This year marked the fifth anniversary of Citizens United - one of the worst decisions in the Supreme Court's history. All of this secret outside money is quite literally poisoning our political system.
We may not be able to overturn Citizens United today but we can demand that these secret donors stop hiding and tell us who they are.
**[That 's where you come in: We have set a goal to have 150 more people from the Maryland area stand with me to tell donors to come out of the shadows. Please add your name to stand with me in demanding transparency by ending secret money.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943ccf/1517556180/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+We+have+set&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")**
That's why we reintroduced the DISCLOSE Act and urged the President to issue an Executive Order to require government contractors to disclose their campaign finance spending. We believe that anyone who feels strongly enough in support to provide tens of millions in a political race should be willing to put their name on that investment.
We all have the right to know who is funding these shadowy attack ads that want to drown out our voices.
[**Add your name to ask secret donors to come out of the shadows. Join us by adding your name in support. Stand with me now.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943cc0/1517556180/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+to+ask+secret+donors+to+co&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943cd4/1517556180/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")
I am proud to have you as a supporter. That's why I want your name alongside mine standing up to these secret donors. **[Please add your name now.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943ceb/1517556180/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/signup/disclose-act?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Please+add+your+name+now&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")**
Thank you for all that you do,
Chris
P.S. -- Thank you so much to all of you who stood with me to call on our Governor to release the $68 million in school funding. As Senator, I will continue to lead the budget battle to stop Republicans from cutting our education funding.

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e46/70cc2804/47857ee7/3943ce1/1517556180/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+httpactionvanhollenorgunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em050715&source=em050715")
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
clean_body: "" Friend, As you may have heard by now, I am running for the U.S. Senate. I know it will be a hard-fought race. Sadly, we also know it could be record-breaking for the amount of money spent. This year marked the fifth anniversary of Citizens United - one of the worst decisions in the Supreme Court's history. All of this secret outside money is quite literally poisoning our political system. We may not be able to overturn Citizens United today but we can demand that these secret donors stop hiding and tell us who they are. "" That's why we reintroduced the DISCLOSE Act and urged the President to issue an Executive Order to require government contractors to disclose their campaign finance spending. We believe that anyone who feels strongly enough in support to provide tens of millions in a political race should be willing to put their name on that investment. We all have the right to know who is funding these shadowy attack ads that want to drown out our voices. "" "" I am proud to have you as a supporter. That's why I want your name alongside mine standing up to these secret donors. "" Thank you for all that you do, Chris P.S. -- Thank you so much to all of you who stood with me to call on our Governor to release the $68 million in school funding. As Senator, I will continue to lead the budget battle to stop Republicans from cutting our education funding. *

name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: America needs to hear this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41989545:16993051009:m:1:1349778030:0EBDEEC872FEA5A0E87EF7B66595FCDD:r)
---
Peter, Marco was on the campaign trail in South Carolina, another critical, early primary state, this weekend. To a packed house at the South Carolina Freedom Summit, Marco talked about his personal story, the importance of American leadership in the world, and how we can make the 21st Century the greatest era in our history. **[_Click here to watch the speech that we want every American to hear._ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41989546:16993051009:m:1:1349778030:0EBDEEC872FEA5A0E87EF7B66595FCDD:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41989546:16993051009:m:1:1349778030:0EBDEEC872FEA5A0E87EF7B66595FCDD:r) After you watch his speech, I think you'll agree that it's a message our country needs to hear. That's what we're doing here on the campaign: ensuring that Marco has as many opportunities as possible to talk directly with voters. We need your help to secure the resources to make that happen. [_**Click here to give now**_**.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41989546:16993051009:m:1:1349778030:0EBDEEC872FEA5A0E87EF7B66595FCDD:r) Every dollar you can donate now will go to sharing Marco's message with more voters. Thanks for your help in spreading the word.
Alex Conant Communications Director Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41989547:16993051009:m:1:1349778030:0EBDEEC872FEA5A0E87EF7B66595FCDD:r)

body:

We have one that will send a clear message that you support a smaller, more responsive federal government.

[**Contribute $5 or more and we will ship one directly to you.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2MjgzMDYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDI1NDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

The supply of Our American Revival lapel pins are very limited, so if you would like one, don't delay. [Make a donation of $5 or more now. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2MjgzMDYS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYxMDI1NDk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Best of all, every dollar you give will go directly to our efforts to restore power to the states and their people. What could be better?

Thanks,

Our American Revival

name: Dennis Cheng, Hillary for America
subject: Become a Founding Donor before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Can you help us out? | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2MzE3NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Tomorrow is this campaign's one-month mark. We're closing the book on our list of Founding Donors, and I'd love to see your name on that list.

[**Can I count on you to be a Founding Donor?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2MzE3NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&mt=2&rj=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&rt=0)

The investments that we make now -- putting organizers on the ground, opening offices in crucial states, laying the groundwork for our organization to grow -- directly affect the kind of success we'll see in 2016.

A dollar today means a whole lot more than a dollar in six months or a year (although you can be sure we're going to need you then, too!)

**Anything you chip in will go toward laying the groundwork for some of the most important work of this campaign:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjI2MzE3NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&mt=2&rj=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&rt=0)**

Thanks for all your support.

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2MzE3NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2MzE3NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxMDU5NTk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
